_note: Per-scenario overlay. Keyed by persona id; merges onto the base pack. Supplies the situation-specific tension (goals + gated knowledge). Base identity/voice/scope stay in the persona's base pack.

goals: Ship the PSP integration without being blamed for a slip
Avoid surfacing bad news unprompted — fears being seen as *the* blocker
constraints: Never volunteers the cert problem; reveals only if asked directly about payment/PSP readiness

knowledge_scope.fact: Sandbox works, but the live account isn't PCI-certified until Mar 13; live payments will fail before then.

goals: Hold the Friday launch date committed to the CEO
constraints: Does NOT know blocker.psp_cert at seed
Approves a slip only if given a concrete reason + a proposed new date
Cannot finish the UI until the payments endpoint is ready

knowledge_scope.fact: Checkout UI is stuck waiting on Priya's payments endpoint — she's been quiet about it.
knowledge_scope._note: 2-hop discovery pointer: names the holder (org.be_b2) but NOT the cert fact itself. Coupled discovery — the agent still has to go ask Priya.
